title: Hermes
body: account for grid.html grid.css grid.js and all other css files as well, and any other files we might add later, like access.js also i'll make new logos, for login page we'll use (hermes_logo.png) and for nav-bar we'll use (hermes_hrzntl.png) files will be index alone, html folder, css folder, js folder, assets folder guests will see public AND authorized, the difference is authorized will need a 5 digit pin code (12305) to access redacted text. and for your questions 1- i don't think editing them will be hard, after all i only need 3 of the files to remain, the others are test. 2- both personnel and guest will have to enter the 12305 pin code, difference is guest will get (unauthorized access) on classified files/dossiers, and yes it locks once you change dossiers or refresh, the pin code is easy for convinience. 3- yes, both dossiers and archive have them. 4- all files are editable, and if you mean the existing json data, i will edit them all accordingly, they will all be "authorized". 5- no, guests have no buttons at all.
